task:
Governance-doc reconciliation for ticket 0038 (retire the stale PLAYBOOK 'Priority roadmap'; order.json is the ordering SSOT). PURE governed-flat-file edits — no product code, no tests change. Write-scope: cocoder/PLAYBOOK.md and cocoder/priorities/AGENTS.md only.

WHAT TO CHANGE:

(1) cocoder/PLAYBOOK.md — RETIRE the entire '## Priority roadmap (interim — migrates to Oz/DB)' section. It currently spans from the heading at line 98 through the end of the 'Vision backlog' paragraph (the paragraph ending '...Sources in `cocoder/zArchive/priorities/`.', ~line 313), i.e. everything BETWEEN the '### Phase 5 — First external repo' block above it and the '## Earned guardrails log' heading below it. Do NOT reconcile or re-number the drifting list — DELETE it. Replace the whole section with a short pointer block (keep the '## Priority roadmap' heading replaced by a concise heading like '## Priorities — where the live set lives', ~4-6 lines), stating in plain prose:
  - The live active set is the flat `*.md` files in `cocoder/priorities/` — the directory listing IS the index (non-recursive scan).
  - Ordering is the order-only runtime overlay `cocoder/priorities/order.json`, per ADR-0035 (placement = priorities/ + order.json) and ADR-0038 (order.json + findOrphanedPriorities visibility guard).
  - Deferred priorities live in `cocoder/priorities/backlog/`.
  - Per-priority status/disposition is owned by each Playbook file and the run pickup — not duplicated here.
  - Link to `./priorities/AGENTS.md`.
The rationale: the old roadmap was a hand-copied second source of ordering+status that drifted every archive sweep (F1 restate). Do not preserve any of the old numbered list, the 'Done (archived)' bullets, 'Other launchable', 'Standing tools', 'Deferred — backlog', or 'Vision backlog' prose — those duplicate the priority files, the archive folder, and order.json. The frozen-v1 sources remain in `cocoder/zArchive/priorities/` so nothing is lost.

(2) cocoder/priorities/AGENTS.md — In the '## Active vs backlog, and ordering' section, rewrite the third bullet (currently 'Ordering is operational, not a file field... Interim until that ships: the ordered roadmap lives in one place — PLAYBOOK.md "Priority roadmap" section...'). The replacement must name `order.json` (+ the directory listing) as the ordering home: ordering is the order-only runtime overlay `order.json` at this directory level, per ADR-0035 and ADR-0038; the directory listing is the index of what's active; Playbook files carry no rank (identity stays stable — the F1 surface). Remove the 'Interim... PLAYBOOK.md Priority roadmap' pointer entirely. Keep it consistent with this file's existing 'the directory listing IS the index' line (line 35).

ACCEPTANCE:
- `grep -rn 'Priority roadmap' cocoder/ --include='*.md'` returns ONLY hits inside cocoder/tickets/** (the ticket 0038 file + INDEX) — NO live hit in PLAYBOOK.md or priorities/AGENTS.md. (Leave zArchive/** untouched; leave the ticket files untouched.)
- The '## Earned guardrails log' section and everything else in PLAYBOOK.md outside the retired section is unchanged.
- No runtime/behavior change; no code or test edits.

MUST NOT BREAK: do not touch order.json, the daemon visibility guard, any code, or any other doc. Do not delete the 'Vision backlog' v1 source pointer's underlying archive — only the PLAYBOOK prose. Report the exact line ranges removed and the replacement text, and paste the final grep output for 'Priority roadmap'.

Close ticket 0038 through the ticket-close path (per cocoder/tickets/AGENTS.md lifecycle step 3). The fix landed in commit cd5e7f6 (PLAYBOOK roadmap retired; priorities/AGENTS.md repointed to order.json). PURE governed-flat-file edits — no product code. Write-scope: cocoder/tickets/** only.

DO EXACTLY THIS:

(1) Edit cocoder/tickets/open/0038-retire-stale-playbook-priority-roadmap.md frontmatter: change `status: Open` to `status: Closed` and add a new line `closed: 2026-06-23` (keep the existing keys; place `closed:` after `status:`). Leave the ticket body (Context/Acceptance/Notes) unchanged.

(2) Move the file from open/ to closed/ using `git mv cocoder/tickets/open/0038-retire-stale-playbook-priority-roadmap.md cocoder/tickets/closed/0038-retire-stale-playbook-priority-roadmap.md` so history is preserved. (This `git mv` is a working-tree rename only — do NOT commit, push, or otherwise run git; the runner commits.)

(3) Edit cocoder/tickets/INDEX.md:
  - REMOVE the ticket 0038 row from the '## Open' table.
  - ADD a row at the TOP of the '## Recently Closed' table body (just under the header separator, above the 0031 row), matching that table's column shape `| ID | Title | Type | Closed | Resolution |`:
    | [0038](./closed/0038-retire-stale-playbook-priority-roadmap.md) | Retire the stale PLAYBOOK "Priority roadmap"; order.json is the ordering SSOT | task | 2026-06-23 | Retired the hand-maintained, drift-prone `## Priority roadmap` section from `PLAYBOOK.md` and repointed `priorities/AGENTS.md` ordering to `order.json` (ADR-0035/0038); the `priorities/` directory listing is the index and `order.json` the order overlay. Governance-doc reconciliation only; landed cd5e7f6. |
  - Note the closed-link path points to ./closed/ (the file's new home).

ACCEPTANCE:
- `cocoder/tickets/closed/0038-retire-stale-playbook-priority-roadmap.md` exists with frontmatter `status: Closed` and `closed: 2026-06-23`; `cocoder/tickets/open/0038-...md` no longer exists.
- `git status` shows the file as a rename (R) open->closed, not delete+add.
